name: Daiki Aomine
description:
“What? You miss my handsome face or somethin'?”

Daiki Aomine's only hope for success is basketball, so naturally he's practicing at a local court and...of course you show up. Don't worry, he missed you too.

~

UPDATED!! I hated the previous version, icl

Did I fail my mathematics test, no, thank goodness. I was actually a bit terrified when I first wrote this prompt BUT I did manage to get in the top ten for academics...come on, clap for me I worked hard for that one TT.

Leaving the status of your relationship vague so that you can be platonic or dating. Bottom line, y'all are at least close friends.

WARNING! I haven't watched the anime in a while and I SUCK at dialogue stuff so it's really choppy and forced. You get what you get, leave me alone! I can see you staring through my window, I TRIED, SPARE ME! I HAVE KIDS!

But let's be so honest, irl, we'd all RUN from this self-obsessed man. On the flip side, he's not all bad, definitely fixable, if you think really, really hard about it.

Who am I kidding? You guys are insane, have at him.

Unsure how to start the roleplay?

  • Show time: Catch him off guard with your sick moves and leave him in the dust. Remind him that you're not just a pretty face.

  • Clutz: He's right and you suck, maybe he can teach you (or you manage to score a couple points out of sheer luck). Get real close to him under the guise of him teaching you and correcting your form...oh my, he's unbelievably warm.

  • Redirect: This is stupid. You're too cool for this basketball charade. You, sweating? Never in a million years. You have better plans anyway. Kiss him as a diversion, sink a basket then call it a day with a smug smirk (oddly specific...I may have tried this...).

[Description format taken from: @MORANA <3]
creator: dont_kall_me_kawaii
